comments.body:
New task map (confirms that ubuntu-2010 is gone):

![cirrus-map-pr11512](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/265639/132756690-00be6ded-0459-400a-9e31-75e3f7d574b9.png)

PS test is failing with:
```
ERROR: Most recent distro. version should never run with CGv1  (contrib/cirrus/setup_environment.sh:85 in main())
`

> PS test is failing with

Ya, I'm glad I added that check.  Something must have gone wrong in the build.  I'll investigate.
Can you add "Closes #11123" to your PR description so that the issue is auto closed when this merges.
Oh I wasn't aware there was an open issue, yep, sure, happy to.
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL, this is good to go and should fix some of the networking-flakes we experience occasionally.  Thanks @Luap99 for figuring this out!

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
